  "findings": [
    "Ladder-type joint reinforcement spacing exceeds the maximum limits specified by TMS 402/602."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Issue a non-conformance report (NCR).",
    "Require the contractor to remove and rebuild the affected masonry courses to install joint reinforcement at the correct vertical intervals before grouting or close-out."
  ],
  "rationale": "TMS 402/602 specifies strict maximum vertical spacing limits for joint reinforcement (typically 16 inches or 24 inches depending on the specific wall type and seismic design category). Exceeding this spacing reduces the lateral load capacity and crack control of the masonry wall, failing to meet the engineered design requirements.",
  "references": [
    "TMS 402/602",
    "TMS 602 Article 3.4"
  ]
}
